title: lathyrus linnaei subsp. tournefortii
intro: Lathyrus linnaei subsp. tournefortii, also known as the Lathyrus or grass pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus linnaei subsp. tournefortii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
